nodes.summary: parse_literal_pairs() MUST accept newline-separated key=value pairs as primary format
parse_literal_pairs() MUST emit log_warn on failure so consumers have a visible diagnostic regardless of RUNTIME_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED
Documentation MUST declare newline-separated key=value pairs as the accepted format; comma-separated is no longer accepted
reconcile_eso_runtime_secrets.sh error message MUST reference newline-separated format only
Values MUST NOT be truncated or split at internal commas; full value preserved verbatim
record_reconcile_issue MUST emit on parse failure with corrected format description
New test passes: newline-separated literal with comma-in-value (data URI) reconciles successfully
New test passes: comma-separated input is rejected (non-zero exit + log_warn visible in stderr)
Positive-path test asserts full value (including comma) preserved verbatim in rendered secret
